deep_dive.title: COB: a comprehensive database of chloroplast outer envelope beta-barrel proteins
deep_dive.abstract: Despite their central role in metabolite exchange, lipid trafficking, and protein import, chloroplast outer envelope beta-barrel proteins lack a dedicated comprehensive sequence database spanning many plant proteomes. Here we present the database COB (chloroplast outer-envelope beta-barrel), consisting of 16,586 beta-barrel sequences organized across ten protein categories and an uncharacterized group. COB was constructed using a machine learning classifier that identifies chloroplast beta-barrels based on features derived from evolutionary protein contact maps. Analysis of COB reveals that Streptophyta have more barrels overall and use a greater variety of solute transporters than Chlorophyta. Furthermore, we find considerable structural diversity across OEP categories, including variation in beta-strand count and a high prevalence of open barrel conformations not observed in bacterial outer membrane proteins. Structure predictions for Arabidopsis thaliana outer envelope proteins identified candidate hybrid barrel assemblies, with TOC159 family members emerging as universal interaction partners. We also report single-chain multi-barrel domain architectures in the chloroplast outer envelope, a topology previously described only in Gram-negative bacteria. Finally, we find chloroplast membrane barrels have more open topologies and shorter strands than bacterial membrane barrels. COB provides a comprehensive sequence resource for chloroplast outer envelope beta-barrels and establishes a foundation for investigating the evolution, structure, and function of this essential protein in chloroplast.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: comprehensive database of chloroplast outer envelope beta-barrel proteins, including transporters relevant to carbonate transport
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 叶绿体外膜β-桶蛋白综合数据库，包含与碳酸根转运相关的转运蛋白
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 叶绿体外膜β-桶蛋白综合数据库，包含与碳酸根转运相关的转运蛋白
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 叶绿体外膜β-桶蛋白综合数据库，包含与碳酸根转运相关的转运蛋白
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Presents COB, a comprehensive database of 16,586 chloroplast outer envelope beta-barrel sequences, revealing evolutionary differences in solute transporters between Streptophyta and Chlorophyta, directly relevant to studying carbonate transport in hornworts.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 该研究构建了叶绿体外膜β-桶蛋白的综合数据库COB，包含16,586条序列，覆盖十个蛋白类别和未表征组。通过机器学习分类器识别β-桶蛋白，并分析发现链形植物比绿藻拥有更多β-桶蛋白和更多样的溶质转运蛋白。该数据库为角苔中碳酸根转运蛋白的鉴定和演化比较提供了直接资源。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 该研究构建了叶绿体外膜β-桶蛋白的综合数据库COB，包含16,586条序列，覆盖十个蛋白类别和未表征组。通过机器学习分类器识别β-桶蛋白，并分析发现链形植物比绿藻拥有更多β-桶蛋白和更多样的溶质转运蛋白。该数据库为角苔中碳酸根转运蛋白的鉴定和演化比较提供了直接资源。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: Carbonate transport proteins in the carbon concentration process of hornworts

quick_skim.title: A spatial atlas of the seaweed CO2-fixation machinery reveals a unique Rubisco condensation mechanism
quick_skim.abstract: Seaweeds (macroalgae) are important primary producers that sustain food webs in coastal ecosystems. Most algae accelerate inorganic carbon assimilation by actively concentrating CO2 in a Rubisco-rich specialized organelle called the pyrenoid. However, the molecular composition of this pathway is unknown in seaweeds. Here, we investigated the intracellular localization of 160 proteins associated with CO2 acquisition in the green seaweed Ulva (Sea lettuce). We assign 68 proteins to different pyrenoid subdomains and identify a consensus Ulva Rubisco binding motif revealing the molecular logic of the Ulva pyrenoid. We reveal Seaweed Ulva Pyrenoid Assembly 1 (SUPA1) as the core pyrenoid assembly factor. We show that Rubisco condensation is driven by a unique mechanism: the helical folding of SUPA1 motifs upon Rubisco binding, combined with steric hindrance that halves the available Rubisco binding sites from eight to four. Our data gives an unprecedented sub-cellular spatial understanding on seaweed carbon fixation and provides insights into the evolution of this important pathway in the global carbon cycle.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: seaweed pyrenoid and CO2-fixation machinery relevant to algal CCM
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 海藻蛋白核与CO2固定机制，与藻类CCM相关

quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 海藻蛋白核与CO2固定机制，与藻类CCM相关
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Spatial atlas of seaweed CO2-fixation machinery reveals pyrenoid subdomains and a unique Rubisco condensation mechanism, providing molecular insights into algal CCM.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本研究通过蛋白质组定位构建了海藻（石莼）CO2固定机制的空间图谱，揭示了68种蛋白在蛋白核不同亚区的分布，发现SUPA1为蛋白核核心组装因子。该工作阐明了海藻Rubisco凝聚的分子逻辑，为理解藻类碳浓缩机制提供了重要参考，但对角苔碳酸根转运蛋白的直接研究仍欠缺。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 本研究通过蛋白质组定位构建了海藻（石莼）CO2固定机制的空间图谱，揭示了68种蛋白在蛋白核不同亚区的分布，发现SUPA1为蛋白核核心组装因子。该工作阐明了海藻Rubisco凝聚的分子逻辑，为理解藻类碳浓缩机制提供了重要参考，但对角苔碳酸根转运蛋白的直接研究仍欠缺。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: Papers central to 以角苔碳浓缩机制碳酸根转运蛋白为主题，分基础藻类 CCM、角苔蛋白核通路、碳酸根转运蛋白家族、演化对比四类梳理必读文献方向与检索关键词, especially work that connects or combines: t; h; Carbonate transport proteins in the carbon concentration process of hornworts.
